title: PM operating rhythm automation
hypothesis: If ProductOS keeps structured workspace state current, it can generate high-quality PM coordination outputs with much less manual reconstruction work.
positioning_hypothesis: ProductOS will win as the PM operating layer that makes recurring coordination outputs traceable enough to trust.
offering_hypothesis: The offering should behave as a workflow and decision layer rather than a generic all-in-one PM suite.
wedge_hypothesis: Reducing manual reconstruction in recurring PM rhythms is the most credible entry wedge for a challenger posture.
why_now: PM operating load is rising while AI-assisted drafting shifts the bar toward judgment and trusted automation.
why_us: ProductOS already centers structured workflow state, traceability, and validation instead of isolated drafting.
advantage_hypothesis: The combination of workflow memory and reliability controls can make automation trusted enough for real operating work.

prioritization.priority_rationale: The concept should be prioritized immediately because it translates a validated PM problem into a bounded wedge with clear handoff value.
prioritization.reviewer_handoff: PM should review the wedge and confirm the concept stays inside the current challenger claim boundary.

must_be_true_assumptions: PMs will trust a structured first draft if traceability is visible
The workflow can fit around existing tools instead of replacing them first
open_questions: What minimum source coverage is required before the PM trusts an automated draft?
risk_summary: The concept weakens if ProductOS tries to promise broad PM autonomy before proving the operating-rhythm wedge.
Story quality will degrade if the concept loses the explicit persona and evidence spine.
handoff_readiness_summary: The concept is reviewable and ready for PM judgment, but it still expects one explicit confirmation on wedge sharpness before broader downstream automation.
